title: Nature's ZooVentures GUI
description: A cute, themed GUI overhaul made for content creator NatureOfGaming.
body:
### A cute, monstera and red panda themed GUI overhaul resource pack created for the content creator [NatureOfGaming](https://www.twitch.tv/natureofgaming/about)!



![Menu preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e1hkdSOL/images/b3b336ba8313d1a375d57feb51cd234c34d50099.png)_In-game screenshot credits include mods Mystic's Biomes, ZAWA: Evolved, and Click for Hot Chicks, and Complementary shaders._



Nature's ZooVentures GUI was created for a 1.16.5 modpack, however, future versions of minecraft will be supported eventually.



### Currently supported mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Appleskin
- Click for hot chicks
- Cosmetic armor
- Curios
- Doggy talents
- Easy villagers
- Iron chest
- Just enough items
- Just enough professions
- Just enough resources
- Polymorph
- Quark
- Realistic horse genetics
- Relics
- Simple voice chat
- Simply cats
- Sophisticated backpacks
- Travelers backpack
- Truly custom horse tack
- Waystones
- Xaero's minimap
- Xaero's world map
- ZAWA: evolved

</details>
